element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Loss of powerup on death creates tension
Single-hit death mechanic makes shields critical
Requires navigation skill, cannot be destroyed
Perspective shift from horizontal; stages 2, 4, 6 use this
Death restarts from last checkpoint with powerup loss
Timed escape from alien's rectal cavity before implosion

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Relentless with difficulty spikes. High tension maintained by one-hit-death penalty. Relief occurs briefly after powerup collection, but tension escalates as player advances through stage. Stages 2, 4, 6 perspective shifts break monotony. Final stage introduces time pressure, elevating tension to maximum.

spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Stage select hidden via controller button sequence at copyright screen; invulnerability and max powerups cheat available

difficulty_curve.early_game: Moderate introduction with single-shot and basic enemy patterns. Powerup availability eases early learning. Stage 1 part 2 introduces indestructible obstacles, raising difficulty.
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Escalating enemy density and complexity. Perspective shifts in stages 2, 4, 6 force new spatial reasoning. Loss of all upgrades on death becomes increasingly punishing as stages demand specific weapons.
difficulty_curve.late_game: Severe difficulty spike in later stages (5-6). Dense organ-enemy patterns. Stage 7 escape sequence introduces time pressure element, combining movement restriction, enemy fire, and countdown tension.
notable_spikes: Stage 2: Perspective shift to downward-scrolling vertical; disorienting for horizontal shooter players
Stage 4: Vertical stage with increased enemy complexity
Stages 5-6: Spike in enemy projectile density and mini-boss difficulty
Stage 7: Final escape sequence combines all mechanics under time pressure

notable_level_patterns.description: Stages 1, 3, 5, 7 use traditional left-to-right horizontal scrolling. Player navigates through organ-enemy gauntlets, collects powerups, defeats mini-bosses at stage midpoints and endings.
Stages 2, 4, 6 shift to vertical perspective scrolling downward (rather than upward, inverting typical vertical shooter convention). Changes spatial reasoning and enemy approach vectors.
All stages feature mid-stage and end-stage checkpoints. Death resets player to last checkpoint with all weapon upgrades lost, forcing slower restart segment.
Enemies throughout game resemble internal organs: brains, eyes, cilia, hatchling creatures. Visual theme reinforces setting inside Parasitis alien organism.
Stage 7 breaks from standard boss-fight pattern. Player must navigate outward from alien rectal cavity while Parasitis implodes around them, combining chase mechanics with time pressure.
